meta.notes: Clean test. MiniMax music generation: 163.0s for 16.0s track (hype/120BPM trap). 26 scene cuts detected, sync mode auto-selected. Output 3.4x larger than input (HEVC→H.264 re-encode). Wall_total includes estimated 14s upload (wall_end recorded before upload call — timing note). Music generated inline in beat_sync_full step.

task.name: music-beat-sync
task.purpose: Add hype BPM-matched beat-sync music to a 67.8s vertical vlog (720p HEVC) using --vibe hype --dev
task.expected_output: An MP4 video with hype trap music, video cuts synchronized to beats

install.notes: hub show + hub install v1.0.6. pip deps installed during skill_install (librosa, scipy, etc.).

steps.name: scene_detection
steps.notes: ffmpeg select filter scene>0.35, 26 cuts detected in 67.8s video

steps.name: music_generation_minimax
steps.notes: 163.0s for 16.0s track, hype/120BPM trap. Included inside beat_sync_full.

steps.name: beat_alignment
steps.notes: 136 beats @ 120BPM (0.5s interval). Sync mode, 27 segments speed-adjusted. Included in beat_sync_full.

steps.name: audio_mix
steps.notes: ffmpeg replace-mode audio overlay. Included in beat_sync_full.

steps.name: beat_sync_full
steps.notes: Full script wall time: S1 probe + S2 music_gen + S3 beat_calc + S4 align + S5 mix. Music gen at 163.0s is dominant bottleneck (71.8% of beat_sync_full).

execution.notes: Scene detection run standalone before full script (as instructed). Probe also run standalone. beat_sync_full re-runs probe and scene-detect internally.

delivery.notes: pika-upload-file. 16.1MB output. Upload time estimated at 14s (wall_end recorded pre-upload).
